# provisionNewUser

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for provisionNewUser

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useProvisionNewUserMutation(); mutate({ input: { email: '<String>', password: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useProvisionNewUserMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useProvisionNewUserMutation();
mutate({ input: { email: '<String>', password: '<String>' } });
```
